name: 我的修仙世界My Xiuxian World
short_description: This is an action role-playing game and you can customize your character, control with a mouse and keyboard, and defeat enemies. The story begins on Lingshi Island, defeat the enemy and then challenge the Black Sword sect all the way to ascend to immortality.
detailed_description:
This game is an action adventure game. The game combines real-time combat and role-playing elements.

-Combat System : Adopting real-time combat mechanism, players can use skills to fight against enemies.

-Character Growth and Customization: As the plot progresses, players will enhance their character's abilities, unlock new skills, and customize their own character.

At the beginning of the game, you can use 1 skill and 3 combo attacks: 1 skill corresponds to key 1 on the keyboard, which is a wide range damage skill; The damage in the first two stages of the general attack is very low, try to hit the third stage attack as much as possible. Then, based on the in-game strategy interface and corresponding instructions for the buttons, continuously become stronger and defeat even stronger enemies.

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
